steps.title: Compare distance from fifty
steps.content: Each list is centered at $50$, so the least standard deviation comes from the list whose values stay closest to $50$.

steps.title: Check the tightest list
steps.content:
For the list $49,50,50,50,51$, the deviations from $50$ are
$$
-1,0,0,0,1
$$
The sum of squared deviations is
$$
1+0+0+0+1=2
$$
The other lists include values farther from $50$, so they have larger spread.

steps.title: Pick the least spread
steps.content: The list $49,50,50,50,51$ has the least spread, so it has the smallest standard deviation. The answer is D.
